chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 199 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.5 at “A” 2. For orders on CMA No.1818/2017 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.973/2016 23.10.2025 This reference application is pending since 2017 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. Diary demonstrates that on 06.11.2019 time was sought to reformulate questions of law; same has not been done in six years and even otherwise applicant remains unrepresented without intimation or justification. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
